summary: Iteration 42: Tested Parental Controls System and Softer Color Scheme. All backend APIs pass (7/7 tests). Fixed critical bug where GET parental-controls endpoint required auth but students don't have JWT tokens. NarrativeReader now correctly enforces parental controls.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Removed auth requirement from GET /api/students/{id}/parental-controls to allow student portal access
/app/backend/tests/test_parental_controls.py - Created new test file for parental controls API
seed_data_creation: Set test student SJ with audio_required, chapter_threshold=0, can_skip_recording=false for testing parental control enforcement
context_for_next_testing_agent: Parental Controls system fully tested. GET endpoint no longer requires auth (fixed). Reading Rules panel works in Guardian Portal with all buttons/toggles. NarrativeReader shows recording required notice, recording block warning, and disabled finish button when parental controls mandate recording. Softer color scheme implemented in BrutalCard/Button/Badge components.

backend_parental_controls_api.GET /api/students/{id}/parental-controls: PASSED - Returns default controls if none set, works without auth for student portal
backend_parental_controls_api.PUT /api/students/{id}/parental-controls: PASSED - Saves all control fields (recording_mode, chapter_threshold, can_skip_recording, auto_start_recording, require_confirmation), requires auth

guardian_portal_reading_rules.recording_mode_buttons: PASSED - Optional, Audio Required, Video Required, Both Required buttons work
guardian_portal_reading_rules.chapter_threshold_input: PASSED - Number input with description visible
guardian_portal_reading_rules.toggle_controls: PASSED - Auto-Start Recording, Require Confirmation, Allow Skip toggles work
guardian_portal_reading_rules.save_button: PASSED - Saves controls via API with success toast

narrative_reader_enforcement.recording_required_notice: PASSED - Purple banner shows 'Audio recording required by parent — must complete before continuing'
narrative_reader_enforcement.recording_block_warning: PASSED - Yellow banner shows 'Complete the recording above before you can finish this chapter'
narrative_reader_enforcement.finish_button_disabled: PASSED - Button is disabled when recording required but not done and skip not allowed
narrative_reader_enforcement.required_recording_section: PASSED - Shows Audio/Video buttons and Start Reading Aloud button

softer_color_scheme.brutal_card: PASSED - Uses #f8f6f1 (warm beige) instead of white, rounded-lg borders
softer_color_scheme.brutal_button: PASSED - Has gentler colors with rounded-lg corners
softer_color_scheme.brutal_badge: PASSED - Uses softer pastel variants with rounded-md

verified_features.student_codes_pins_visibility: PASSED - Codes in indigo background, PINs in yellow/cream background with excellent contrast
verified_features.notification_bell: PASSED - Visible in Guardian Portal header with unread count badge

bug_fixed.issue: GET /api/students/{id}/parental-controls required authentication via get_current_user, but students don't have JWT tokens since student-login returns student data without a token
bug_fixed.root_cause: The endpoint was designed for guardian access only but NarrativeReader in student portal needs to fetch controls
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Removed Depends(get_current_user) from GET endpoint, keeping it on PUT endpoint for security

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real implementations connected to MongoDB
